name: QuerySnapshot
description: Ephemeral immutable actuals projection frozen across active facts, category hierarchy, evidence, reconciliation, payment attribution, pools, and relationships.
schema_def: query_snapshot: id, contractVersion, canonicalFilterHash, generationFingerprint, categoryHierarchyFingerprint, createdAt, expiresAt, exact full-set totals, exact requested groups. query_snapshot_item: snapshotId, ordinal, active transaction projection including direct category and frozen ancestryIds, pool or unassigned, instrument or unknown, cardholder or unknown, evidence kinds, reconciliation state, relationship state, and exact contributions. First page materializes all rows under one BEGIN IMMEDIATE transaction; later pages are read-only. Order is effectiveDate descending then transactionId descending. Snapshot state is ephemeral, excluded from Durable Ledger State and backup, and may be cleaned opportunistically.
